neutral.description: No prior history. Cautious but not hostile.

colleagues.description: Familiar working relationship. Mild baseline goodwill.

old_friends.description: Long-standing personal trust. Reluctant to suspect each other.

deferential.description: One party tends to defer to the other's judgment.

rivals.description: Competing interests. Cooperative when necessary, watchful always.

distrustful.description: A history of broken trust or conflicting motives.

suspicious.description: Neutral on the surface but quietly watching for deception.

hostile.description: Active antagonism. Cooperation only under extreme pressure.

unknown.description: Complete strangers with no prior impression.
